news.title:
Indiamart Intermesh saw a 61.5x volume spike to 3.16L shares, stock rose 0.4% to Rs.2082.
Kirloskar, Sapphire Foods, United Breweries, Jupiter Wagons also saw significant volume surges and price increases.
news.summary:
Indiamart Intermesh saw a 61.5x volume spike to 3.16L shares, stock rose 0.4% to Rs.2082.
Kirloskar, Sapphire Foods, United Breweries, Jupiter Wagons also saw significant volume surges and price increases.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods India shared its Q3FY26 corporate presentation highlighting 7% YoY growth in restaurant sales to ₹8,112 Mn and EBITDA margin at 16.8%.
The company operates 1,028 restaurants, including KFC, Pizza Hut, and Taco Bell, with ongoing expansions and a merger approved with Devyani International.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods India shared its Q3FY26 corporate presentation highlighting 7% YoY growth in restaurant sales to ₹8,112 Mn and EBITDA margin at 16.8%.
The company operates 1,028 restaurants, including KFC, Pizza Hut, and Taco Bell, with ongoing expansions and a merger approved with Devyani International.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods announced the Q3 FY26 earnings call recording is available on its website.
The recording discusses financial results for the quarter and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods announced the Q3 FY26 earnings call recording is available on its website.
The recording discusses financial results for the quarter and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title: Sapphire Foods reported a Q3 net loss of ₹48M, down from a profit of ₹120M YoY.
news.summary: Sapphire Foods reported a Q3 net loss of ₹48M, down from a profit of ₹120M YoY.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods India Ltd reported unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, with total income of Rs. 8,208.9M and net loss of Rs. 48.1M for the quarter.
The Board approved Mr. Kushal Agarwal's appointment as Non-Executive Nominee Director and a merger scheme with Devyani International Ltd, subject to regulatory approvals.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods India Ltd reported unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, with total income of Rs. 8,208.9M and net loss of Rs. 48.1M for the quarter.
The Board approved Mr. Kushal Agarwal's appointment as Non-Executive Nominee Director and a merger scheme with Devyani International Ltd, subject to regulatory approvals.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods India surged 7.1% on 4 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 202.6 intraday high.
The stock outperformed the Leisure Services sector and a subdued Sensex.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods India surged 7.1% on 4 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 202.6 intraday high.
The stock outperformed the Leisure Services sector and a subdued Sensex.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods India Ltd's board meeting on 6th Feb 2026 will review Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window remains closed until 9th Feb 2026 as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods India Ltd's board meeting on 6th Feb 2026 will review Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window remains closed until 9th Feb 2026 as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods announces an analyst/investor meet on 15th Jan 2026.
Meeting with Nippon Mutual Fund will be virtual and one-to-one.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods announces an analyst/investor meet on 15th Jan 2026.

news.title:
Macquarie cut targets on QSR stocks citing weak dine-in traffic and muted SSS growth.
Target prices fell for Devyani (-20%), Westlife (-20%), Sapphire (-19%), and Jubilant (-7%).
news.summary:
Macquarie cut targets on QSR stocks citing weak dine-in traffic and muted SSS growth.
Target prices fell for Devyani (-20%), Westlife (-20%), Sapphire (-19%), and Jubilant (-7%).

news.title:
GIFT Nifty trading above 26,300 hints at a positive Nifty 50 open.
Stocks in focus: Sapphire Foods, Vodafone Idea, Devyani International, and NLC India.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty trading above 26,300 hints at a positive Nifty 50 open.

news.title:
Devyani International shares rose 7.8%, hitting Rs 159.45 post merger news.
The merger with Sapphire Foods creates India's largest Yum Brands franchisee.
news.summary:
Devyani International shares rose 7.8%, hitting Rs 159.45 post merger news.
The merger with Sapphire Foods creates India's largest Yum Brands franchisee.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods India will merge with Devyani International.
Devyani will offer 177 shares for every 100 shares of Sapphire.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods India will merge with Devyani International.
Devyani will offer 177 shares for every 100 shares of Sapphire.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods received a demand order for INR 203.2M under CGST Act for 2018-2022.
The order cites excess ITC claims; no material financial impact reported by the company.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods received a demand order for INR 203.2M under CGST Act for 2018-2022.
The order cites excess ITC claims; no material financial impact reported by the company.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods and Devyani International announce a $934M merger.
The deal creates a fast-food giant operating KFC and Pizza Hut in India.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods and Devyani International announce a $934M merger.
The deal creates a fast-food giant operating KFC and Pizza Hut in India.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods India Ltd announces an analyst and investor meet on 10th Dec 2025.
Details and corporate presentation are available on stock exchanges and company's website.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sapphire Foods and Devyani Foods are in advanced merger talks.
Proposal suggests Sapphire to merge into Devyani, which stays listed.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sapphire Foods India Ltd received a demand notice from ESIC for INR 5.6M.
The notice pertains to dues from A.N. Traders Pvt Ltd before 2016; no material impact noted.
news.summary:
Sapphire Foods India Ltd received a demand notice from ESIC for INR 5.6M.

news.title:
QSR sector saw mixed results in Sep quarter; some had strong SSSG.
Challenges included weak dine-in recovery, margin pressures, and urban demand.
news.summary:
QSR sector saw mixed results in Sep quarter; some had strong SSSG.

news.title:
Sapphire Foods to hold investor meetings with Nippon Mutual Fund and Wellington Management on Nov 17 and 20, 2025.
Investor presentation is available on stock exchanges and company website as per Regulation 30 compliance.
